The work involves the flushing and chemical cleaning of the chilled water system to remove debris, scale, and contaminants.
Ensure compliance with all relevant standards, project specifications, and safety regulations

title: GMCA 1797 Project Slate - Business Case Support
description:
Provision of consultancy services to support GMCA's case to government for Project Slate. Provide specialist and direct engagement support. 
Support is required on developing the Business Case and building the support for the project locally and nationally (including the right government sponsor) to secure agreement.
Route to Market = Exemption (sole supplier and value for money) in line with the PA23 regulations and constitution.

title: CVD (Cardiovascular Disease) Prevention Support
description:
To support primary care in utilising existing data tools and platforms
to deliver an upscaled approach to Cardiovascular Disease (CVD)
Prevention to aid delivery of QOF.
Will focus on Lipid Optimisation but promotes a holistic approach to
long term conditions by taking the opportunity to support those
conditions closely linked to blood pressure.
The programme builds on the existing CVD Detect & Perfect
programme being delivered by Eclipse, providing risk stratification
pathways to best identify
